assertions.text: Output is structured under four headings: What This Dataset Is, What It Covers, Limitations and Caveats, and Potential Story Angles
The What It Covers section specifies the exact time range, geographic scope, and unit of analysis
At least two genuine, specific limitations are identified, not generic disclaimers
Output includes 3-5 story angles grounded in the specific variables available in the dataset
The brief is written in plain editorial language with no statistics formulae or data science jargon
